description: Style NoteEarthy tones for the summer, catwalk serves up another stylish sandal for women. We love the innovative design details on this pair!Product DetailsSynthetic toe separator, midfoot strap (heavily embellished) and an ankle loop (elastic)Footbed with decorative thread detailsA short heelTPU outsole with a grooves on the forefootMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
